---
name: Security Discussion
about: Discuss security design, safe use, or defensive improvements
title: "[Security]: "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> **Do not report undisclosed vulnerabilities here.** Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/OWNER/CyberTool/security/advisories/new) instead.

## Security Topic

Describe the security-related topic (design, policy, module behavior, hardening idea).

## Authorized Use Case

Explain the legitimate, authorized scenario this discussion supports.

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low — documentation or UX clarity
- [ ] Medium — module behavior or configuration
- [ ] High — authentication, credential storage, or offensive scope

## Mitigation Idea

Describe proposed mitigations, guardrails, or documentation updates.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, standards (CIS, NIST), or lab practices.
